infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: ParkEase needs your location to find nearby parking spaces and show them on the map.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: ParkEase needs your location to find nearby parking spaces even when the app is in the background.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: ParkEase needs camera access to let you take photos of your parking space listings.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: ParkEase needs photo library access to let you upload photos of parking spaces.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow ParkEase to use your location to find nearby parking.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow ParkEase to access your photos for uploading parking images.
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow ParkEase to use your camera for taking parking photos.
